creator: fbsd-ports@opsec.eu
text:
Some mail bounced, causing reset of MAINTAINER

Fix: 

Please set the MAINTAINER to fbsd-ports@opsec.eu for

	www/p5-HTML-Perlinfo
	devel/dragon
	devel/lfc
	devel/lfcxml
	databases/cego
	databases/p5-DBD-cego
	databases/my2cego
	security/p5-Auth-YubikeyDecrypter

	Thanks!
How-To-Repeat: 	-
